tasks.subject: Task 1: Add nix-wrapper-modules flake input
tasks.description: Add nix-wrapper-modules as a flake input pointing to github:sini/nix-wrapper-modules with nixpkgs.follows = nixpkgs-unstable

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create wrapped-packages flake-parts module
tasks.description: Create modules/flake-parts/features/wrapped-packages.nix that wraps alacritty via wlib.wrapHomeModule

tasks.subject: Task 3: Verify flake integrity
tasks.description: Verify nix flake check passes, cortex build succeeds, and nix run .#alacritty launches
